title: [BUG] API returns 500 on empty payload
description: Sending an empty JSON body to POST /v1/issues results in a 500 error instead of a 400 validation error.
author: alice

title: [BUG] Login form ignores Enter key
description: On the login page pressing Enter in the password field does not submit the form in Chrome.
author: bob

title: [BUG] Incorrect total in cart summary
description: Cart total does not include shipping fee when promo code is applied.
author: carol

title: [BUG] 404 page missing localization
description: The 404 error page is always shown in English even when the locale is set to de-DE.
author: dave

title: [BUG] Session timeout too aggressive
description: Users are logged out after ~5 minutes of inactivity instead of the configured 30 minutes.
author: alice

title: [BUG] CSV export corrupts non-ASCII characters
description: Customer names with accents are exported as question marks in the CSV report.
author: bob

title: [BUG] Mobile menu overlaps footer
description: On small screens the expanded mobile navigation overlaps the footer making links unclickable.
author: carol

title: [BUG] Double charge on slow network
description: On a slow connection clicking the Pay button twice charges the customer twice.
author: dave

title: [BUG] Websocket disconnects after 60 seconds
description: Real-time notifications stop arriving after about a minute even though the tab is active.
author: alice

title: [BUG] Password reset link invalid in Outlook
description: Password reset links opened from Outlook desktop are URL-encoded twice and rejected by the backend.
author: bob

title: [FEATURE] Dark mode for dashboard
description: Add a dark theme toggle for the analytics dashboard with persisted user preference.
author: carol

title: [FEATURE] Bulk edit for issues list
description: Allow selecting multiple issues and changing status, assignee, and labels in one action.
author: dave

title: [FEATURE] SSO with Azure AD
description: Implement SSO integration with Azure Active Directory for enterprise tenants.
author: alice

title: [FEATURE] Export board to PDF
description: Product managers want to export the kanban board as a PDF snapshot for stakeholders.
author: bob

title: [FEATURE] In-app notifications center
description: Add a notifications panel listing recent events with filters and read/unread state.
author: carol

title: [FEATURE] Custom fields for projects
description: Admins should be able to define custom fields for projects with basic validation.
author: dave

title: [FEATURE] Slack integration for alerts
description: Send high-priority incident alerts to a configurable Slack channel.
author: alice

title: [FEATURE] Time tracking on tasks
description: Add simple time tracking per task with manual entry and weekly summary report.
author: bob

title: [FEATURE] Saved filters for backlog
description: Allow users to save complex backlog filters and share them with the team.
author: carol

title: [FEATURE] Project-level API tokens
description: Introduce project-scoped API tokens with configurable permissions.
author: dave

title: [UX] Improve empty state for issues list
description: When there are no issues, show helpful actions and a friendly illustration instead of a blank table.
author: alice

title: [UX] Clarify permissions error messages
description: Replace generic 'Forbidden' toast with specific explanation of missing permission.
author: bob

title: [UX] Make labels selection searchable
description: The labels dropdown becomes hard to use with many items; add typeahead search.
author: carol

title: [UX] Better contrast for disabled buttons
description: Disabled buttons are too low-contrast on some monitors and look like plain text.
author: dave

title: [UX] Remember last used project
description: When a user returns to the app, open the last active project instead of the first alphabetically.
author: alice

title: [UX] Inline editing for issue title
description: Allow editing the issue title directly from the details view without opening a modal.
author: bob

title: [UX] Keyboard shortcuts for navigation
description: Introduce keyboard shortcuts for switching between backlog, board, and reports.
author: carol

title: [UX] Improve search results ranking
description: Search should prioritize exact matches in title over partial matches in description.
author: dave

title: [UX] Show avatars in comments
description: Display user avatars next to comments to improve readability of long threads.
author: alice

title: [UX] Loading skeleton for issue details
description: Replace spinner with skeleton UI while issue details are loading.
author: bob

title: [INFRA] Upgrade Postgres to 16
description: Plan and execute upgrade of the primary Postgres instance from 14 to 16.
author: carol

title: [INFRA] Introduce staging environment
description: Create a dedicated staging environment mirroring production topology.
author: dave

title: [INFRA] Add Redis cluster monitoring
description: Configure Redis Exporter and dashboards to monitor cache health and hit ratio.
author: alice

title: [INFRA] Migrate object storage to S3
description: Move file uploads from local disk to S3-compatible storage with lifecycle rules.
author: bob

title: [INFRA] Introduce centralized logging
description: Ship application logs to a centralized ELK stack with structured fields.
author: carol

title: [INFRA] Harden Kubernetes RBAC
description: Review and tighten Kubernetes RBAC roles for CI and developers.
author: dave

title: [INFRA] Add CDN in front of static assets
description: Serve static assets via CDN to improve latency for global users.
author: alice

title: [INFRA] Automate DB backups verification
description: Nightly job to restore backups into a test instance and run smoke checks.
author: bob

title: [INFRA] Add rate limiting at gateway
description: Configure API gateway to limit abusive clients and protect backend services.
author: carol

title: [INFRA] Optimize Docker images size
description: Refactor Dockerfiles to use slim base images and multi-stage builds.
author: dave

title: [TECHDEBT] Replace legacy HTTP client
description: Migrate remaining usages of the deprecated HTTP client to the new wrapper.
author: alice

title: [TECHDEBT] Consolidate date utilities
description: We have three different date helper modules; consolidate into a single library.
author: bob

title: [TECHDEBT] Remove feature flags for v1 onboarding
description: v1 onboarding is now default; clean up old flags and dead code paths.
author: carol

title: [TECHDEBT] Refactor monolithic notifications service
description: Split notifications service into smaller modules by channel (email, push, web).
author: dave

title: [TECHDEBT] Add tests for billing proration
description: Billing proration is complex and under-tested; add unit and integration tests.
author: alice

title: [TECHDEBT] Remove unused CSS utilities
description: Clean up unused utility classes from the legacy CSS bundle.
author: bob

title: [TECHDEBT] Normalize logging format
description: Standardize log fields and levels across services for easier debugging.
author: carol

title: [TECHDEBT] Migrate to Python 3.12
description: Update codebase and dependencies to support Python 3.12 as the default runtime.
author: dave

title: [TECHDEBT] Introduce type hints in core modules
description: Add typing to critical modules and enable strict mypy checks.
author: alice

title: [TECHDEBT] Cleanup legacy feature toggles
description: Archive and remove toggles that have been permanently enabled for more than 6 months.
author: bob

title: [BUG] Comment editor loses text on refresh
description: If the page is refreshed while writing a comment, the draft is lost instead of being auto-saved.
author: carol

title: [BUG] Pagination shows wrong total pages
description: When filters are applied, the total pages count does not update correctly.
author: dave

title: [BUG] Attachments fail for large images
description: Uploading images larger than 10MB fails silently without error message.
author: alice

title: [BUG] Board column WIP limit not enforced
description: Issues can be moved into a column even when the WIP limit is exceeded.
author: bob

title: [BUG] Wrong timezone in activity log
description: Timestamps in the activity log are shown in UTC instead of user timezone.
author: carol

title: [BUG] Search indexing skips archived projects
description: Issues from archived projects should remain searchable but are currently missing.
author: dave

title: [BUG] Tag suggestions show duplicates
description: Tag autocomplete sometimes shows duplicate entries for the same label.
author: alice

title: [BUG] Cannot reopen closed epic
description: Closing an epic is irreversible due to missing 'Reopen' action.
author: bob

title: [BUG] Jira import drops comments
description: Comments are not imported when syncing issues from Jira projects.
author: carol

title: [BUG] Filter by assignee ignores unassigned issues
description: Selecting 'Unassigned' in the assignee filter returns no results.
author: dave

title: [FEATURE] Roadmap view for epics
description: Introduce a timeline view of epics with start/end dates and progress.
author: alice

title: [FEATURE] Custom SLA policies
description: Allow configuring SLA rules per project and surfacing breaches in the UI.
author: bob

title: [FEATURE] Dependency graph between tasks
description: Show visual dependencies between tasks and block merges when blockers are open.
author: carol

title: [FEATURE] Multi-project search
description: Support searching across all projects with advanced filters.
author: dave

title: [FEATURE] GitHub checks integration
description: Display GitHub checks status directly in the issue view when linked to a PR.
author: alice

title: [FEATURE] Email-to-issue gateway
description: Allow customers to create issues by sending emails to a project-specific address.
author: bob

title: [FEATURE] Service-level dashboards
description: Provide SLO/SLA dashboards aggregating metrics across multiple projects.
author: carol

title: [FEATURE] Auto-assign based on component
description: Automatically assign new issues to owners based on affected component.
author: dave

title: [FEATURE] Audit log export
description: Admins need to export audit logs for compliance reviews.
author: alice

title: [FEATURE] Multi-language UI support
description: Add support for Spanish and German UI translations.
author: bob

title: [UX] Simplify project creation flow
description: Reduce the number of steps and required fields when creating a new project.
author: carol

title: [UX] Clarify priority labels
description: Replace P0/P1/P2 with human-friendly labels and help text.
author: dave

title: [UX] Add quick filters on board
description: Provide one-click filters for 'My issues', 'Recently updated', and 'Blocked'.
author: alice

title: [UX] Improve onboarding checklist
description: The onboarding checklist is easy to skip; make it more prominent and contextual.
author: bob

title: [UX] Better error page for 500s
description: Show user-friendly 500 page with retry and support links instead of raw stack trace.
author: carol

title: [UX] Make epic links more discoverable
description: Users do not notice that issues are part of an epic; add clearer badges and navigation.
author: dave

title: [UX] Improve contrast in dark mode
description: Some text in dark mode fails WCAG contrast requirements on older monitors.
author: alice

title: [UX] Add breadcrumbs to settings pages
description: Users get lost in nested settings; add breadcrumbs and back links.
author: bob

title: [UX] Auto-focus search input
description: When opening the search overlay, focus should move automatically to the input field.
author: carol

title: [UX] Show relative times by default
description: Use '5 minutes ago' style timestamps in lists, keep exact time on hover tooltip.
author: dave

title: [INFRA] Add canary deployment pipeline
description: Enable canary releases for the API service with gradual traffic shifting.
author: alice

title: [INFRA] Introduce feature flag service
description: Move feature flags from config files into a dedicated service.
author: bob

title: [INFRA] Implement zero-downtime migrations
description: Standardize approach for schema migrations without downtime.
author: carol

title: [INFRA] Add synthetic monitoring probes
description: Run synthetic checks from multiple regions to detect outages early.
author: dave

title: [INFRA] Secure secrets management
description: Migrate secrets from environment variables to a managed secrets store.
author: alice

title: [INFRA] Add per-tenant rate limits
description: Support per-tenant throttling rules to prevent noisy neighbors.
author: bob

title: [INFRA] Introduce blue-green deployments
description: Support blue-green releases for critical services with fast rollback.
author: carol

title: [INFRA] Implement centralized tracing
description: Adopt OpenTelemetry-based tracing across all services.
author: dave

title: [INFRA] Add autoscaling policies
description: Configure HPA for API and workers based on CPU and queue length.
author: alice

title: [INFRA] Harden TLS configuration
description: Disable weak ciphers and enforce TLS 1.2+ for all public endpoints.
author: bob

title: [TECHDEBT] Reduce controller complexity
description: Split large controller classes into smaller, focused modules.
author: carol

title: [TECHDEBT] Introduce linters in CI
description: Add flake8 and eslint checks to CI pipelines and fix existing violations.
author: dave

title: [TECHDEBT] Replace custom auth middleware
description: Simplify authentication by using the framework-provided middleware.
author: alice

title: [TECHDEBT] Improve test data factories
description: Refactor test factories to be faster and easier to compose.
author: bob

title: [TECHDEBT] Remove deprecated REST endpoints
description: Clean up v1 REST endpoints that have GraphQL replacements.
author: carol

title: [TECHDEBT] Migrate cron jobs to scheduler service
description: Move legacy cron jobs into the centralized scheduler with observability.
author: dave

title: [TECHDEBT] Remove direct DB access from UI
description: Ensure the UI talks only to APIs, not directly to the database.
author: alice

title: [TECHDEBT] Standardize error handling strategy
description: Adopt a consistent pattern for propagating and logging errors.
author: bob

title: [TECHDEBT] Remove unused feature modules
description: Archive and delete features that are no longer in use by any tenant.
author: carol

title: [TECHDEBT] Document architecture decisions
description: Backfill ADRs for major decisions taken over the last year.
author: dave
